growth.title: Growth journey starts here
growth.body: Complete creation tasks to unlock more creator benefits.

create.title: New creation
create.description: Start with the format that fits the note.
create.imageBody: Supports png, jpg, and jpeg image formats.
create.videoBody: Supports mp4 and mov video formats.
create.liveBody: Use the live assistant to start a stream.
create.liveUnavailable: Live creation opens in the creator home. Showing live data overview instead.

topics.title: Creation topics
topics.description: Follow trends and let traffic arrive naturally.

academy.title: Creator academy
academy.overseasTitle: A guide for overseas creators to join
academy.brandTitle: Step 1 of creation: build your brand
academy.dataGuideTitle: Use data overview to review your account rhythm
academy.fanCareTitle: Build a repeatable fan care workflow
academy.contentTuneTitle: Tune notes with topic and search signals
academy.viralFormulaTitle: A practical formula for popular notes
academy.noteHookTitle: Write openings that keep readers moving

news.title: Creator news
news.headline: New creator programs and platform updates

upload.videoTitle: Drag a video here or click upload
upload.imageTitle: Upload images, or create image cards from text
upload.podcastTitle: Drag an audio file here, or click upload audio
upload.podcastDescription: Supports m4a, mp3, wav, flac, and aac. Audio should be 10 minutes to 2 hours and under 1GB.

guide.sizeBody: Supports videos up to 4 hours and files up to 20GB.
guide.formatBody: Supports common video formats. MP4 and MOV are recommended.
guide.resolutionBody: Upload videos above 1080P on desktop for clearer quality.
guide.imageFormatBody: PNG, JPG, JPEG, WebP, and AVIF are recommended. GIF and live photos are not supported.
guide.imageResolutionBody: 3:4 to 2:1 works best. Use at least 720 by 960 for crisp posts.
guide.audioFormatBody: Supports m4a, mp3, wav, flac, and aac files.
guide.audioDurationBody: Publish audio between 10 minutes and 2 hours.
guide.rssBody: Bring episodes from an existing RSS feed when podcast sync is ready.

article.title: Start a long-form note
article.description: Create a structured article from scratch or import a source link before editing.
article.newCreationHint: Start with a blank long-form editor.
article.importLinkHint: Bring in a link and draft around it.

collection.articleBody: Group related articles so readers can browse the whole series.
collection.podcastBody: Create a dedicated podcast page and surface episodes on your profile.

editor.title: Post content
editor.videoPlaceholder: Add a description, chapters, credits, or shooting notes...
editor.imagePlaceholder: Add a caption, product notes, steps, or a short story...
editor.articlePlaceholder: Draft your article outline, paragraphs, links, and references...
editor.podcastPlaceholder: Add episode summary, highlights, timestamps, and guest notes...

richText.simpleHint: Simple mode keeps the common note formatting tools visible.
richText.fullHint: Full mode adds headings, alignment, quotes, code, dividers, and history controls.
richText.markdownHint: Edit Markdown source directly, including GFM, footnotes, and inline HTML.
richText.previewHint: Safely preview the final published result.
richText.linkPrompt: Paste or edit a link URL

preview.title: Feed preview
preview.bodyFallback: Your description preview will appear here.

tips.title: Creation tips
tips.coverBody: A bright cover with one visual subject is easier to scan.
tips.hookBody: Put the strongest takeaway in the first line.
tips.tagsBody: Use a few focused tags instead of a broad list.

footer.autosave: Draft changes are stored locally in this preview workflow.

toast.ready: Publish flow is ready for backend upload integration.

推論ストリームを待っています。

customPromptSamples.novelMarkdown: 『倚天屠龍記』の読後感/あらすじ分析を 1500 字で書いてください。構成を明確にし、目次索引を整理し、Markdown 形式を使用してください。

aiFormat.emptySource: 元テキストはありません。カスタムモードでは指示だけで生成できます。

modeHints.custom: 指示と現在の本文をもとに生成または編集します。
